rejection_reason: compliance: email_require_legal_footer — email is missing the required CAN-SPAM legal footer containing a physical address and unsubscribe link. All commercial emails must include this regardless of tone or length.
text:
Subject: {{company}}'s onboarding bottleneck, {{first_name}}

Hey {{first_name}},

I noticed {{company}} just posted three new ops roles — that usually means onboarding volume is picking up faster than the process can handle.

We help operations teams at SaaS companies cut onboarding time by 40% without adding headcount.

Worth a 15-minute call to see if we can help {{company}}?
